title: Is Zepto down? Users hit by mass outage, face disruptions on app and website
snippet: Zepto, the quick-commerce platform, appeared to suffer some outages on Sunday, with users reporting issues with its app and website, according to Downdetector.

title: Instagram, Facebook down? Thousands of users report mass outage; netizens say ‘no posts coming up on feed after refresh’
snippet: Many users encountered error messages while attempting to log in to Facebook's desktop site. According to outage-tracking platform DownDetector, reports of issues with Instagram and Facebook occurred in New Delhi, Ahmedabad, Mumbai, Pune, Kolkata and other cities in India.

title: Google Pixel 11a key specs leaked ahead of Made by Google event: Tensor G6, 120Hz display and 8GB RAM tipped
snippet: A new leak about the Pixle 11a has showcased the phone's key specs including its display, processor and battery.

title: US allows federal employees to download TikTok on official devices
snippet: The US Justice Department has lifted the ban on TikTok for federal employees

title: Still leaving your home unwatched? These 5 indoor security cameras help you keep an eye on everything
snippet: All of these security cameras offer 360-degree of monitoring. In addition to this, these cameras also offer support for night vision technology.

title: Semicon 2.0: Govt to match VC funding in chip design, pick equity
snippet: Under the scheme unveiled on Wednesday, the government will match private investments in eligible startups in return for equity to reduce funding gaps in one of the country's most capital-intensive technology sectors.

title: BGMI 4.5 update: Naruto themed maps, Spider-Man mode, Ferrari cars and everything new
snippet: KRAFTON has launched BGMI 4.5, introducing a Naruto-themed gameplay mode with new locations and abilities, alongside a Spider-Man crossover, licensed Ferrari vehicles, and anniversary rewards.&nbsp;

title: Vivo T5 Lite 44W 5G in India with 120Hz display, 6,500mAh battery:  Check price and specs
snippet: The Vivo T5 Lite 44W 5G features a 6.74-inch HD+ display, MediaTek Dimensity 6300 processor, and a 6,500mAh battery.&nbsp;

title: Apple reveals businesses that won't be allowed to advertise on Apple Maps
snippet: Apple plans to introduce ads on Apple Maps, restricting certain businesses from advertising.

title: Microsoft trains sales team to talk down OpenAI, Anthropic AI models, pitches itself as 'full AI platform': Report
snippet: Microsoft is training sales teams to compete against Anthropic and OpenAI by emphasizing its superior offerings in AI.&nbsp;

title: How Korean stocks turned from trusty bellwether to AI frenzy

title: TSMC expects 'strong, multi-year' demand for AI chips as it ramps up Arizona investment
snippet: Speaking after blockbuster second-quarter results on Thursday, Chief ​Financial Officer Wendell Huang said the company is "very happy" with progress in Arizona, which is why it decided to ramp up investment to $265 billion.

title: China's Moonshot AI pauses new Kimi K3 subscriptions amid surge in demand
snippet: In a social media post, Kimi AI stated the surge in demand over the last 48 hours has pushed the company's current capacity close to its limits. Hence, to ensure a stable experience for existing subscribers, new subscriptions have been temporarily paused.

title: How a dispute over ecommerce firm Coupang is testing US-South Korea ties
snippet: South Korea's decision to fine e-commerce firm Coupang over a data leak has drawn criticism from Washington and raised questions about the country's openness to ​American tech, raising worries the matter is impacting Seoul's relations with ​the U.S.

title: Facebook, Instagram face outage as users report access issues
snippet: According to Downdetector, which tracks outages by aggregating user-submitted problem reports, the complaints peaked around the afternoon and eased after a couple of hours. Users reported problems in logging into their accounts in several parts of the globe, including India.

title: India, Spain to fast-track UPI-Bizum interoperability talks
snippet: The two countries have also discussed ways to strengthen investment facilitation, improving mobility of professionals and promoting joint investments in Latin America, leveraging Spain's strategic position as India's gateway to Europe and Latin America.
